prompt: I want to build a 6-foot-tall garden trellis from quarter-inch mild steel — silhouette of climbing vine leaves, cut on the plasma table. I'm at Maker Nexus and cleared on metalshop. The pattern's an organic curve so I want plasma rather than waterjet. Powder coat finish in matte black. Tier 2 packet please. Include the cut path strategy — I haven't run the plasma at this scale before.

assertions.text: design.md or op-sequence covers cut-path strategy (lead-in, kerf, pierce points, sequencing)
BOM specifies mild steel + powder coat finish
op-sequence references the metalshop or plasma area at Maker Nexus
risks.md addresses fume / heat / cutting hazards specific to plasma
